_comment: Example data for capability-matrix template. Fictional 'edge AI capability → proof point' matrix, 6 rows, 2 columns. Replace with your actual capabilities and evidence citations when authoring a real proposal graphic.
title: Capability → Proof Point Map
subtitle: Every commitment in this proposal traces to deployed evidence or peer-reviewed research

cells: Deployed at 1st, 7th, and 10th Special Forces Groups under the SOF AI Pilot — operational today
Military task performance matching cloud-class models
Published research: small on-device model matches or exceeds GPT-5 on military benchmarks at 95%+ statistical significance
Five production MOS/AFSC adapters shipped (Logistics, Combat Medic, Combat Arms, Acquisitions, Cyber)
Multi-platform deployment (laptops, edge servers, TAK, fly-away kits)
Active deployments spanning SOF schoolhouse (SWCS) and conventional force (4th ID NGC2)
Research credibility in military AI domain
First-of-its-kind military LLM refusal benchmark (MilDeflect) — peer-reviewed, established baseline for the field
CDAO Tradewinds 'Awardable' status + SAM.gov active (CAGE 9Z176 / UEI SLZTJUA8DBD3)

footer.tagline: Every capability cited, every claim backed by deployed evidence or peer-reviewed research
